title: epigynum auritum
intro: Epigynum auritum, also known as the golden crown flower or golden glory, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its beautiful golden flowers and unique fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Epigynum auritum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Epigynum auritum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
